name: ExtensionInventoryReport_Status
title: R5: draft | requested | active | entered-in-error (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `InventoryReport.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`InventoryReport.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `InventoryReport.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `InventoryReport.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `InventoryReport` is not mapped.
Element `InventoryReport.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `InventoryReport.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `InventoryReport` is not mapped.
Element `InventoryReport.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
element.isModifierReason: This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the resource should not be treated as valid

element.definition: The status of the inventory check or notification - whether this is draft (e.g. the report is still pending some updates) or active.
